title: verbascum arbelense
intro: Verbascum arbelense, also known as Arbel Mullein, is a species of flowering plant in the figwort family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Verbascum arbelense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Verbascum arbelense can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
